reviews.comment: I was really worried about moving because I have a lot of glass artwork, but these guys made sure it all stayed together! Very professional and serious movers with my items in mind. Couldn’t ask for better

reviews.comment:
Henry and Junior showed up early and even helped me with throwing together the last few things I hadn’t packed. They were friendly, upbeat and effective problem solvers the entire time we moved my furniture and boxes to my new apartment.

Honestly, they made the whole thing really smooth, and it was a pleasure to have hired them. I plan to again in the future, and so should you if you’re looking to make a move! 5/5

reviews.comment: Extremely helpful and got us into our new place in no time! We were all gobsmacked at how quick Mateo was, not to mention a fantastic communicator! Easiest five stars I’ve ever given!

reviews.comment: Such great guys, great customer service! Ben and Ethan were very efficient and on time. Very affordable and great communication. Definitely recommend!

reviewReply.comment: Thanks for mentioning our crew! We’re proud of our team for bringing great energy and care to every Chicago apartment and home move. We truly appreciate you supporting Comfort Moving Chicago, your trusted local moving company.
